meta.method: Inline full audit: live crawl of all sitemap URLs + source-code cross-reference, Lighthouse 12.6.1 mobile lab run, header/redirect testing, citation search. No PSI/CrUX field data (quota), no Google/Moz API credentials, no drift baseline.

summary.business_type: Local Service — service-area general contractor (Monument Construction, Colfax CA; Placer, Nevada, Sacramento, Yolo & El Dorado Counties)
top_findings: FAQPage JSON-LD is HTML-entity-encoded (invalid) on all 6 service pages — FAQSection.jsx renders schema as escaped JSX text child
Mobile lab LCP 14.9s — hero.webp is 753 KB / 1920x1440 with no srcset
hero.webp is preloaded on all 19 pages via static index.html template — 753 KB wasted on 18 pages
No Google Business Profile linkage detected on-site; citations limited to BuildZoom
Apex→www redirect returns 307 Temporary (Vercel dashboard overrides vercel.json permanent rule)
quick_wins: Remove sitewide hero preload + stale emergentagent preconnect from index.html
Compress hero + add srcset (expect Lighthouse mobile 63 → ~90)
Set 308 apex redirect in Vercel dashboard
Footer links to all 7 city pages (Davis has 1 internal in-link today)

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: HSTS preload + CSP + full security header set
Clean robots.txt with sitemap reference; valid 19-URL sitemap, all 200/canonical-consistent
Real 404 status codes; self-referencing canonicals on all pages; clean URLs
Full SSG prerendering (content without JS); TTFB ~50ms; IndexNow key deployed

findings.title: Apex→www redirect is 307 Temporary
findings.description: https://monconbuild.com returns 307 to www despite vercel.json declaring permanent:true; dashboard domain redirect overrides it.
findings.recommendation: Set 308 Permanent in Vercel dashboard domain settings (or remove dashboard redirect).

findings.title: Dead link /cdn-cgi/l/email-protection on all 19 pages
findings.description: Cloudflare Email Address Obfuscation rewrites mailto links; non-JS crawlers see a 404ing link sitewide and '[email protected]' as visible text.
findings.recommendation: Disable Scrape Shield → Email Address Obfuscation; email is already public in JSON-LD.

findings.title: Stale preconnect to customer-assets.emergentagent.com
findings.description: Resource hints remain in index.html but no assets load from that host.
findings.recommendation: Delete preconnect + dns-prefetch.

findings.title: 2-hop redirect chain from insecure apex
findings.description: http://monconbuild.com → https apex (301) → www (307).
findings.recommendation: Optional Cloudflare rule: http apex → https www in one hop.

findings.title: Local sitemap.xml uncommitted and older than deployed
findings.description: Working-copy lastmod dates trail the deployed sitemap; build regenerates it.
findings.recommendation: Commit or discard the local diff.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Strong E-E-A-T: named owner with Person schema, CSLB license deep link, DIY Network TV credits, 25+ years
City pages contain genuinely local content (conservation districts, Title 24, permit jurisdictions) — not doorway pages
Substantive FAQ accordions with prices/timelines on every service page
No thin pages (445–1,332 words); zero duplicate titles/descriptions

findings.title: No fresh-content surface (blog/guides)
findings.description: No mechanism for topical authority or AI-citation coverage beyond service pages.
findings.recommendation: Expand existing FAQ answers into monthly cost/permit guides interlinked with service + city pages.

findings.title: On-page testimonials exist (corrected); third-party reviews absent
findings.description: Correction: the homepage renders named testimonials in the SSG HTML (Neal Mitchell — Grass Valley, Richard Young — Sacramento). No GBP/Yelp/Houzz reviews surface.
findings.recommendation: Start collecting GBP reviews; optionally add Review schema for the attributed testimonials.

findings.title: Homepage is thinnest main page (586 words)
findings.description: Structurally fine as a hub but light on first-party evidence.
findings.recommendation: Add recent-projects or testimonial strip.

findings.title: Dead component TrustBadges.jsx
findings.description: Unused component containing the same broken ld+json pattern.
findings.recommendation: Delete or fix and mount.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Unique titles + meta descriptions on all 19 pages; one H1 each; logical heading hierarchy
100% image alt coverage with descriptive, localized gallery alts
Clean keyword-sensible URL structure; phone number in city-page descriptions

findings.title: Homepage title omits brand name
findings.description: 'Expert Carpentry & Construction | Colfax CA' — no 'Monument Construction'.
findings.recommendation: Include brand, e.g. 'Monument Construction | Finish Carpentry & Contractor, Colfax CA'.

findings.title: Service-page titles underuse geography (26–33 chars)
findings.description: County-level search terms absent; Google observed rewriting one weak title.
findings.recommendation: Add county/city qualifiers, keep ≤60 chars.

findings.title: City pages internally under-linked (1–6 in-links vs 19 for nav pages)
findings.description: Only reachable via /service-areas hub and neighbor cross-links; Davis has 1 in-link.
findings.recommendation: Sitewide footer 'Service Areas' column with all 7 cities.

findings.title: 6 city meta descriptions exceed 160 chars (162–177)
findings.description: Phone number gets truncated in SERPs.
findings.recommendation: Trim to ≤155 chars.

findings.title: No twitter:card; single generic og:image sitewide
findings.description: All 19 pages share hero.webp (1920x1440 WebP) as og:image; no Twitter tags at all.
findings.recommendation: Add summary_large_image cards + branded 1200×630 JPG/PNG default, per-service images ideally.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: GeneralContractor org schema on every page: NAP, geo, areaServed (5 counties + 7 cities), hours, email
Person schema for owner; Service+WebPage+BreadcrumbList valid on all 7 city pages; CreativeWork portfolio items
No fabricated aggregateRating (correct)

findings.title: FAQPage JSON-LD invalid on all 6 service pages
findings.description: Schema ships HTML-entity-encoded (") because FAQSection.jsx renders JSON.stringify as a JSX text child in the body; SSG escapes it. Google drops the block.
findings.recommendation: Use dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{__html: JSON.stringify(faqSchema)}} in FAQSection.jsx:32.

findings.title: BreadcrumbList missing on 4 of 6 service pages
findings.description: Present on finish-carpentry and home-additions only.
findings.recommendation: Mount the existing Breadcrumb component on the other four.

findings.title: sameAs contains only Instagram
findings.description: Weak entity reconciliation.
findings.recommendation: Add GBP, BuildZoom, CSLB, LinkedIn/Facebook once verified.

findings.title: No license credential in schema
findings.description: CSLB #801602 is a differentiator shown on-page but not in schema.
findings.recommendation: Add identifier/hasCredential referencing CSLB license.

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: CLS = 0; TTFB 50ms (edge cache HIT); TBT 220ms
Immutable 1-year caching on /assets; gallery images use medium variants + lazy loading

findings.title: Mobile lab LCP 14.9s — hero.webp is the LCP element
findings.description: 753 KB, 1920×1440, no srcset anywhere on the homepage; Lighthouse mobile performance 63.
findings.recommendation: Recompress + responsive srcset (640/1024/1440/1920w); preload with imagesrcset. Expect perf ~90.

findings.title: hero.webp preloaded on all 19 pages
findings.description: Preload lives in the static index.html template; 18 non-home pages download 753 KB they never render.
findings.recommendation: Move preload to the Home route's Head.

findings.title: Other oversized statics
findings.description: sierra.webp 624 KB (4032px), 3.webp 578 KB, 4.webp 262 KB.
findings.recommendation: Resize to rendered dimensions, recompress.

findings.title: Tap target + label a11y flags (Lighthouse a11y 96)
findings.description: Nav 'Get Free Quote' CTA is 36px tall; one label/content-name mismatch.
findings.recommendation: Increase CTA to ≥44px; align accessible names with visible text.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: robots.txt allows all AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended)
Full SSG content without JS — ideal for AI ingestion; FAQ answers with concrete prices/timelines are highly citable
Clear entity data (org schema everywhere)

findings.title: No llms.txt
findings.description: /llms.txt returns 404.
findings.recommendation: Publish business summary + key URLs (template in ACTION-PLAN.md).

findings.title: FAQ schema invalid where content is most citable
findings.description: Same root cause as schema finding #1.
findings.recommendation: Fix FAQSection.jsx serialization.

findings.title: Email hidden from non-JS crawlers
findings.description: Cloudflare obfuscation; JSON-LD copy intact.
findings.recommendation: Disable obfuscation.

categories.name: Images
what_works: 100% alt coverage, descriptive localized alts
WebP format throughout; gallery medium-size variants; lazy loading with eager first card

findings.title: No responsive srcset anywhere
findings.description: Fixed-size images served to all viewports; hero worst case.
findings.recommendation: Add srcset/sizes at least for hero and top-of-page images.

findings.title: OG image not spec-shaped
findings.description: 1920×1440 WebP instead of 1200×630 JPG/PNG.
findings.recommendation: Create branded 1200×630 default.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Fix FAQSection.jsx schema serialization (dangerouslySetInnerHTML)
Remove sitewide hero preload + stale preconnects from index.html
Responsive compressed hero with srcset; re-run Lighthouse
Set 308 apex redirect in Vercel dashboard
Verify/claim Google Business Profile; link site ↔ GBP

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Footer Service Areas column (7 city links sitewide)
Breadcrumbs on 4 remaining service pages
Title upgrades (brand on homepage; geography on service pages)
Trim 6 city meta descriptions ≤155 chars
twitter:card + 1200×630 OG image
Disable Cloudflare email obfuscation
Expand schema sameAs (GBP, BuildZoom, CSLB, LinkedIn)

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Build 5-10 citations with identical NAP (Yelp, Houzz, Angi, BBB, Facebook, Nextdoor)
Publish real testimonials; start GBP review collection
Monthly cost/permit guide expanding existing FAQ answers
Publish llms.txt
Cleanup: delete TrustBadges.jsx, resolve sitemap diff, drop meta keywords

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Google Search Console: submit sitemap, watch FAQ enhancement report post-fix
Re-run Lighthouse after Phase 1 (target mobile perf 85-95)
Quarterly re-audit; track Map Pack rankings for 7 cities once GBP live

artifacts.notes: Screenshots unavailable — browser pane capture timed out this session; visual checks done via DOM measurement (H1/CTA above fold on desktop 1280 and mobile 375, no horizontal scroll).
